creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pi
Date: Fri Oct 10 18:17:26 UTC 2014
New revision: 370600
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/370600

Log:
  sysutils/ldap-account-manager: 4.7 -> 4.7.1

  Fixes the bug with blank page and "User tried to access entry of
  type ..." log message when DN suffix does not exactly match case
  in LDAP.

  PR:		194290
  Submitted by:	Vasiliy P. Melnik <basil@vpm.net.ua> (maintainer)

Changes:
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/Makefile
  head/sysutils/ldap-account-manager/distinfo
